name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-99
title: SessionStart welcome lost 3 policy-file sub-lines — regression from Plan C
description: User reports the SessionStart welcome banner now emits only one line ('Rabbit workflow ready') instead of the original 4-line block. Original (pre-Plan-C) emitted: (1) banner 'Welcome to rabbit workflow'; (2) sub-line 'philosophy.md    — machine-first · bounded scope · designed deprecation'; (3) sub-line 'spec-rules.md    — determinism first; schema contracts; lifecycle ownership'; (4) sub-line 'coding-rules.md  — think first; simplicity; surgical edits; goal-driven TDD'. Plan C's spec carved this out as 'Out of Scope' and the implementation collapsed to one banner line via welcome_with_policy. User decision (post-Plan-C reflection): welcome message must not change — restore the 3 sub-lines. The additionalContext policy injection appears intact; only the visible sub-lines are missing. Fix candidates: (a) extend contract.lib.runtime.welcome_with_policy to accept an optional sublines arg (list of {text, color}); rabbit-cage's SessionStart RUNTIME declaration in feature.json provides the 3 sub-line texts as args. (b) new API welcome_with_policy_sublines that hardcodes the sub-line shape but accepts the texts. (a) is more general. EITHER fix requires: (i) extend contract spec for whichever API changes; (ii) ensure dispatcher handles multi-print result emission with proper sub-line shape via rabbit_print/rabbit_subline; (iii) rabbit-cage spec rewords / removes the 'sub-lines out of scope' carve-out; (iv) regression test for the deployed welcome banner content. Cross-feature change: needs contract feature + rabbit-cage feature both touched. Blocks: nothing functionally, but the user explicitly requires this be restored before merge.
